headline: Host Hotels & Resorts vs. MGM Resorts International: Which Destination Hotel Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
summary: One company leans on luxury real estate, the other on global gaming and digital bets, see how their financials, risk profiles, and valuations compare for 2026.
